mapper.select:
SELECT lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') AS menuCd, M.MENU_NM AS menuNm, M.MENU_URL AS menuUrl, M.MENU_ORDER AS menuOrder, M.MENU_ID AS menuId, M.MENU_DESC AS menuDesc, M.UP_MENU_ID AS upMenuId, M.USE_YN AS useYn, 'Y' AS menuYn, COALESCE(M.ICON_CLASS_ID, '') AS iconClassId FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M
WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY M.MENU_ORDER

SELECT lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') AS menuCd, M.MENU_NM AS menuNm, M.MENU_URL AS menuUrl, M.MENU_ORDER AS menuOrder, M.MENU_ID AS menuId, M.MENU_DESC AS menuDesc, M.UP_MENU_ID AS upMenuId, M.USE_YN AS useYn, 'Y' AS menuYn, COALESCE(M.ICON_CLASS_ID, '') AS iconClassId FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.MENU_ID IN ( SELECT A.MENU_ID FROM mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH A, mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER UM WHERE UM.USER_GRP_ID = A.USER_GB AND UM.USER_ID = #{userId}::integer ) ORDER BY M.MENU_ORDER

SELECT lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') AS menuCd, M.MENU_NM AS menuNm, M.MENU_URL AS menuUrl, M.MENU_ORDER AS menuOrder, M.MENU_ID AS menuId, M.MENU_DESC AS menuDesc, M.UP_MENU_ID AS upMenuId, M.USE_YN AS useYn, 'Y' AS menuYn, COALESCE(M.ICON_CLASS_ID, '') AS iconClassId FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M WHERE 1=1
AND M.MENU_NM ILIKE '%' || #{menuNm} || '%'
AND M.MENU_URL ILIKE '%' || #{url} || '%'
AND M.USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY M.MENU_ID, M.MENU_CD
